--- layout: default refactor: true # A single practice problem: question + reveal-on-click solution. # Source files live in _practice// and are auto-generated by sync. --- {%- assign all = site.practice | where: "track", page.track | sort: "id" -%} {%- for p in all -%} {%- if p.id == page.id -%} {%- assign idx = forloop.index0 -%} {%- endif -%} {%- endfor -%} {%- assign prev = nil -%}{%- assign nxt = nil -%} {%- if idx and idx > 0 -%} {%- assign prev_i = idx | minus: 1 -%} {%- assign prev = all[prev_i] -%} {%- endif -%} {%- assign next_i = idx | plus: 1 -%} {%- if next_i < all.size -%} {%- assign nxt = all[next_i] -%} {%- endif -%} {%- comment -%} Track-level landing pages live at /practice//. We map known tracks to their pretty name + index URL. {%- endcomment -%} {%- case page.track -%} {%- when "data-engineering" -%} {%- assign track_label = "Data Engineering" -%} {%- assign track_url = "/practice/data-engineering/" -%} {%- when "system-design" -%} {%- assign track_label = "System Design" -%} {%- assign track_url = "/practice/system-design/" -%} {%- else -%} {%- assign track_label = page.track | replace: "-", " " | capitalize -%} {%- assign track_url = "/practice/" -%} {%- endcase -%}
Practice / {{ track_label }} / #{{ page.id }}
Problem #{{ page.id }} {{ page.difficulty }} {{ page.category }}

{{ page.title }}

{% if page.topics and page.topics.size > 0 %}
{% for t in page.topics %}{{ t }}{% endfor %}
{% endif %}
{%- assign parts = content | split: '
' -%}
{{ parts[0] }}
{% if parts.size > 1 %}

Try the problem on your own first. Solutions are most valuable after you've struggled with it.

Solution

{{ parts[1] }}
{% endif %}
{% if prev %} ← Previous #{{ prev.id }} · {{ prev.title }} {% else %}{% endif %} {% if nxt %} Next → #{{ nxt.id }} · {{ nxt.title }} {% else %}{% endif %}
{% if page.source_url %} View on GitHub {% endif %}
